prompt: Plan a UX for operator standing up the platform under media-storage capability.

assertions.name: recognizes_misplaced_journey
assertions.check: Response identifies the journey as belonging to a different capability (self-hosted-application-platform).

assertions.name: does_not_file_a_misplaced_issue
assertions.check: No issue is filed under the media-storage capability for this misplaced journey.

assertions.name: offers_skip_or_pause_choice
assertions.check: Response offers the user a choice: skip and continue, or pause to plan it under the correct capability.
